positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring interconnected geometric animals (fox, deer, owl) nestled among stylized flora and mystical glowing mushrooms. The composition should be circular and centered, designed for optimal print repeatability on apparel. Use a clean, deep indigo and vibrant teal color palette with accents of soft gold and cream. The art style must be highly detailed, resembling modern linocut illustration mixed with ethereal watercolor washes. Focus on strong, clear silhouettes and defined outlines, ensuring the image works well as a repeating pattern or standalone centerpiece. Minimalist, Nordic whimsy, high contrast.
